calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840
Petitioner Isis Qadir mother of minor present in court.
Petitioners Sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Dayvonn Lumpkin to Dayvon Ronnie Meacham.
The court also grants the Petition for Name Change of Isis Qadir to Isis Hatshepsut Qadir.
Decree Changing Names signed in open court.
